---
title: "Strolling players:A harmony of contrasts - by Charlotte Mary Yonge and Christabel R Coleridge(1893)"
year: 1893
slug: "Copy of memoires_of_colonel_bugeaud"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


### Online text of*Strolling players*

### [Click here to download the entire text of*Strolling players; a harmony of contrast*from Internet Archive](http://www.gutenberg.org/etext/2505)
